title: 3-Day Zanzibar & Mikumi Bush-to-Beach Combo
summary: Compact bush-and-beach itinerary connecting Zanzibar with Mikumi for a fast wildlife add-on.
description: A short Tanzania combo for travelers who want the contrast of Zanzibar’s coast and Mikumi’s savanna in one linked three-day structure.

days.title: Arrival in Zanzibar
days.summary: Begin the itinerary with an island arrival, northern beach transfer, and evening at leisure.

days.title: Transfer to Mikumi and afternoon safari
days.summary: Connect from Zanzibar to Mikumi and head straight into a game-viewing experience across the park’s open plains.
days.travel_time_label: Flight or road transfer plus park transfer

days.title: Sunrise wildlife viewing and onward departure
days.summary: Take in a final safari window before transferring onward for Zanzibar extension or departure connection.
